MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-24-2019 Vacated

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY's MOTION For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion for entry of consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. (Health & Safety Code 25249.7(f)(4).)

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
